title: Chore: Add code linting
original_text: Added code linting with ESLint and Prettier. Configured linting rules for code quality. Added pre-commit hooks for automatic linting. Implemented linting in CI/CD pipeline. Added code formatting on save. Result: linting operational.
expected_subject: chore(tooling): add code linting with ESLint and Prettier
expected_body_lines: - Configure linting rules for code quality
- Add pre-commit hooks for automatic linting
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(tooling): add code linting with ESLint and Prettier"
